name: Dana Morales

current_profile.summary: Healthcare analyst at a hospital system (6 years). Strong SQL and BI skills; builds dashboards and operational reports. Understands HIPAA and clinical workflow basics. Limited ML exposure (has used outputs of an existing readmission risk model).
current_profile.ai_experience: Has used outputs of existing ML models

learning_intent: Wants to apply ML to improve patient outcomes and operations (readmission, length-of-stay, staffing). Goal: move from descriptive analytics to predictive modeling and responsible deployment in regulated settings.

target_jd.title: Healthcare Data Scientist
requirements: Build predictive models on EHR and operations data; validate and monitor performance
Develop feature engineering strategies and evaluate model bias and drift
Collaborate with clinicians and IT to deploy models into workflow
Document and communicate insights for clinical and operational stakeholders

expected_skill_gaps.description: Python data stack (pandas/NumPy) and backend/data pipeline basics.
Embeddings, model limitations, and privacy basics for GenAI/ML tools.
Model eval concepts, monitoring, dashboards, and release gates.
PII/PHI handling, retention, and minimization (healthcare-specific constraints).
Clinical risk awareness and evidence synthesis (for AI-assisted clinical decision support).
